thisSessionUpdates.detail: Deep monitoring delivered 04:04. Key findings: CacheProvider API, fp16 intermediates (-30-40% VRAM), mxfp8 quantization, TRELLIS2 ecosystem most mature 3D solution, asset-mcp (Meshy MCP) new agentic workflow entry.

notificationNote: Deep monitoring report delivered at 04:04. TRELLIS2 recommended as primary 3D pipeline. v0.18.2 stable.
